page.name: BackSpin FX
page.pad1: var 'bsFXlong' 1 ? var 'BSFX_echo' 2 ? blink 500ms & set 'BSFX_echo' 0 & effect_active 'backspin' off & set 'BSFX_echo' 0 : off & set 'BSFX_echo' 2 & effect_button 'echo' 2 1 & effect_slider 'backspin' 1 0.456 & effect_active 'backspin' on & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait2_A' 1250ms 1 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.5 'Mute Source:off' 'Trailing Stop:on' & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait2_B' 1250ms 1 & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BSFX_echo' 0 : var 'BSFX_echo' 1 ? blink 500ms & set 'BSFX_echo' 0 & effect_active 'backspin' off & set 'BSFX_echo' 0 : off & set 'BSFX_echo' 1 & effect_button 'echo' 2 1 & effect_slider 'backspin' 1 0.29 & effect_active 'backspin' on & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait1_A' 300ms 1 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.5 'Mute Source:off' 'Trailing Stop:on' & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait1_B' 700ms 1 & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BSFX_echo' 0
page.pad2: var 'bsFXlong' 1 ? var 'BSFX_spiral' 2 ? blink 500ms & effect_active 'backspin' off & set 'BSFX_spiral' 0 : off & set 'BSFX_spiral' 2 & effect_slider 'backspin' 1 0.456 & effect_active 'backspin' on & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait' 1250ms 1 & padfx 'spiral' 0.15 & repeat_start 'BSFX_delay' 1250ms 1 & effect_active 'spiral' off & set 'BSFX_spiral' 0 : var 'BSFX_spiral' 1 ? blink 500ms & effect_active 'backspin' off & set 'BSFX_spiral' 0 : off & set 'BSFX_spiral' 1 & effect_slider 'backspin' 1 0.29 & effect_active 'backspin' on & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait' 400ms 1 & padfx 'spiral' 0.15 & repeat_start 'BSFX_delay' 600ms 1 & effect_active 'spiral' off & set 'BSFX_spiral' 0
page.pad5: var 'bsFXlong' 1 ? var 'BSFX_jet' 2 ? blink 500ms & set 'BSFX_del' 0 & effect_active 'backspin' off & set 'BSFX_jet' 0 : off & set 'BSFX_jet' 2 & effect_slider 'backspin' 1 0.456 & effect_active 'backspin' on & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait5_A' 700ms 1 & padfx 'enigma jet' 0.5 0.75 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.5 'Mute Source:off' 'Trailing Stop:on' & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait5_B' 1800ms 1 & effect_active 'enigma jet' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BSFX_jet' 0 : var 'BSFX_jet' 1 ? blink 500ms & set 'BSFX_del' 0 & effect_active 'backspin' off & set 'BSFX_jet' 0 : off & set 'BSFX_jet' 1 & effect_slider 'backspin' 1 0.29 & effect_active 'backspin' on & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait5_A' 300ms 1 & padfx 'enigma jet' 0.5 0.75 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.5 'Mute Source:off' 'Trailing Stop:on' & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait5_B' 700ms 1 & effect_active 'enigma jet' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BSFX_jet' 0
page.pad6: var 'bsFXlong' 1 ? var 'BSFX_crush' 2 ? blink 500ms & set 'BSFX_del' 0 & effect_active 'backspin' off & set 'BSFX_crush' 0 : off & set 'BSFX_crush' 2 & effect_slider 'backspin' 1 0.456 & effect_active 'backspin' on & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait6_A' 700ms 1 & padfx 'distortion' 0 0.32 0 0.75 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.5 'Mute Source:off' 'Trailing Stop:on' & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait6_B' 1800ms 1 & effect_active 'distortion' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BSFX_crush' 0 : var 'BSFX_crush' 1 ? blink 500ms & set 'BSFX_del' 0 & effect_active 'backspin' off & set 'BSFX_crush' 0 : off & set 'BSFX_crush' 1 & effect_slider 'backspin' 1 0.29 & effect_active 'backspin' on & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait6_A' 300ms 1 & padfx 'distortion' 0 0.32 0 0.75 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.5 'Mute Source:off' 'Trailing Stop:on' & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait6_B' 700ms 1 & effect_active 'distortion' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BSFX_crush' 0
page.pad3: var 'bsFXlong' 1 ? var 'BSFX_cut' 2 ? blink 500ms & set 'BSFX_del' 0 & effect_active 'backspin' off & set 'BSFX_cut' 0 : off & set 'BSFX_cut' 2 & effect_slider 'backspin' 1 0.456 & effect_active 'backspin' on & repeat_start 'BSFX_waitcut2_A' 700ms 1 & padfx 'cut' 0.8 0.5 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.5 'Mute Source:off' 'Trailing Stop:on' & repeat_start 'BSFX_waitcut2_B' 1800ms 1 & effect_active 'cut' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BSFX_cut' 0 : var 'BSFX_cut' 1 ? blink 500ms & set 'BSFX_del' 0 & effect_active 'backspin' off & set 'BSFX_cut' 0 : off & set 'BSFX_cut' 1 & effect_slider 'backspin' 1 0.29 & effect_active 'backspin' on & repeat_start 'BSFX_waitcut1_A' 300ms 1 & padfx 'cut' 0.8 0.5 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.5 'Mute Source:off' 'Trailing Stop:on' & repeat_start 'BSFX_waitcut1_B' 700ms 1 & effect_active 'cut' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BSFX_cut' 0
page.pad7: var 'bsFXlong' 1 ? var 'BSFX_room' 2 ? blink 500ms & set 'BSFX_room' 0 & effect_active 'backspin' off & set 'BSFX_room' 0 : off & set 'BSFX_room' 2 & effect_slider 'backspin' 1 0.456 & effect_active 'backspin' on & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait2_A' 1250ms 1 & padfx 'reverb' 0.45 0.5 'Wet Only:off' 'Trailing Stop:on' & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait7_B' 1250ms 1 & effect_active 'reverb' off & set 'BSFX_room' 0 : var 'BSFX_room' 1 ? blink 500ms & set 'BSFX_room' 0 & effect_active 'backspin' off & set 'BSFX_room' 0 : off & set 'BSFX_room' 1 & effect_slider 'backspin' 1 0.29 & effect_active 'backspin' on & repeat_start 'BSFX_wait7_A' 300ms 1 & padfx 'reverb' 0.45 0.5 'Wet Only:off' 'Trailing Stop:on'& repeat_start 'BSFX_wait1_B' 700ms 1 & effect_active 'reverb' off & set 'BSFX_room' 0
page.pad8: effect_active 'backspin' on ? blink 500ms & effect_active 'backspin' off : effect_button 'backspin' 1

param2.name: `effect_stems ? blink 500ms ? get_text "STEMS FX" : nothing : setting 'fxProcessing' & param_equal 'Pre-Fader' ? get_text 'Pre-Fader' : get_text 'Post-Fader'`
